content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: "hdr_override,spoof(x-user-id),authz_bypass" ⇒ "public_api->spoof(x-user-id)->impersonate"
P: drop_hdr(x-user-id) → sess_only → spoof_denied
V: "req(x-user-id:other)->401" ∧ "req(nohdr,validsess)->ok"
R: ! acct_takeover ∧ ! tenant_cross_access
A: revert_to_sess_only

[AUDIT]
Treat "hdr override,spoof(x-user-id),authz bypass" as a header auth risk, apply drop hdr(x-user-id), and verify spoofed requests fail.
